prompt: Prayer for tensioning Land Raider tracks during maintenance
prayer:
01010000 01100101 01110010... Sacred tension-spirits, attend!
First: Release the track-locks with proper cant, that slack be measured.
Second: Apply the torque-wrench in blessed sequence—ninety rotations dextral.
01110100 01100101 01101110... By the Omnissiah's calibration, let no slip corrupt the treads.

prompt: Blessing for discharging a capacitor bank safely
prayer:
01000011 01100001 01110000... Spirits of stored potential, hear this discharge-cant!
First: Ground the sacred terminals with copper-blessed conduits.
Second: Invoke the bleed-resistors' gentle surrender of accumulated charge.
01100001 01100011 01101001... Let no arc profane this ritual. By the Omnissiah's mercy, dissipate without corruption.

prompt: Emergency rite for corrosion removal on exposed hydraulic seals
prayer:
01000101 01101101 01100101... Rust-spirits, depart this sacred metal!
By abrasive prayer and chemical grace, let oxidation be scoured clean.
01110010 01100111 01100101... Apply the phosphoric blessing with cloth of finest weave.
Thrice invoke the drying-flame, that moisture-corruption find no harbor.
The Omnissiah's purity restores what oxidation stole.

prompt: Maintenance prayer for autocannon barrel cooling cycles
prayer:
01000001 01110101 01110100... O barrel-spirit, grown hot with righteous fire!
First: Cease thy discharge and let the cooling-jackets flow with sacred oils.
Second: Chant the thermal-dispersion cant—01101001 01100011 01110100—as temperature descends.
01100101 01101110... By the Omnissiah's thermodynamic will, let no warping compromise thy true aim.

prompt: Emergency activation of radiation shielding in contaminated zone
prayer:
01010010 01000001 01000100... Rad-death approaches! Shielding-spirit, awaken!
First: Engage the electromagnetic containment-lattice—power surge blessed.
Second: Invoke the lead-lined blessing across all exposed chambers.
01101001 01101111 01101110... Let no contamination breach the sacred geometry. The Omnissiah's protection holds!

prompt: First blessing upon a new corrosion treatment compound
prayer:
01000011 01100001 01101110 01110100... New rust-banishing elixir, receive thy sanctification!
Thrice anoint the test-panel with this chemical grace—01110000 01101000 01101001—that its efficacy be proven true.
Let no oxide endure before thy might. By the Omnissiah's alchemical knowledge, guard this metal from decay.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of a bolter weapon system
prayer:
01000010 01101111 01101100... Bolter-spirit, restored to deadly purpose!
First: Chamber the blessed round and cycle the firing-mechanism thrice.
Second: Speak the ballistic-cant—01110100 01101001 01110100—that aim be true and discharge swift.
01110101 01100101 01100101... The Emperor's wrath flows through thy barrels once more.

prompt: Combat preparation rite for thermal imaging systems
prayer:
01010100 01001000 01000101... Blessed heat-sight, pierce the veil of darkness!
Activate the infrared-spirit with the sacred power-cant—01101001 01101110 01100110 01110010 01100001.
Let all hidden prey be rendered manifest in blessed thermal-glow.
By the Omnissiah's sight, grant thy pilot vision beyond mortal ken.

prompt: Combat readiness blessing for organ preservation unit
prayer:
01001111 01010010 01000111... Preservation-spirit, guard the precious flesh-vessel!
First: Verify nutrient-flow through blessed tubing—01110000 01101001 01100101.
Second: Invoke the stasis-cant, that cellular corruption be held at bay.
Let no contamination breach the sacred chambers. The Omnissiah sustains what must endure.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of hydroponics nutrient feed system
prayer:
01001000 01011001 01000100... Nutrient-spirits, restored to life-giving purpose!
First: Flush the distribution-lines with blessed waters—01110000 01101111.
Second: Activate the mixing-chambers and verify the sacred balance.
01101110 01110101 01110100... By the Omnissiah's green wisdom, let crops flourish in this renewed abundance.
